Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n### Quick assessment\n- Current dosing parameters are present and appear internally consistent.\n- No obvious red flags are visible from the dosing configuration alone.\n- Patient notes suggest CU-001 and CU-002 are clinically stable/responding, while CU-003 is early in treatment.\n- This summary is based on the dosing config only and is **not** a full PK model health check.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and saved a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

**Quick dosing summary**
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Config source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated admin dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| CU-002 | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

**Clinical notes**
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

**PK model stability**
- Based on the **dosing config alone**, nothing jumps out as unstable or inconsistent.
- The patient-specific parameters look coherent, and the notes are generally reassuring.
- That said, this is **not a full PK model health check** — I haven’t reviewed model monitoring outputs or validation logs here.

If you want, I can also format this into a short email once you give me Dr. Martinez’s address.
